title: Implement a tree maintenance program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a tree maintenance program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Undertake site assessment of trees

pcs.text: Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement site-specific control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement site-specific control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement site-specific control measures.

pcs.text: Perform a site assessment and liaise with client to identify conditions that may impact upon the health of trees on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform a site assessment and liaise with client to identify conditions that may impact upon the health of trees on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform a site assessment and liaise with client to identify conditions that may impact upon the health of trees on site.

pcs.text: Identify genus and species of trees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify genus and species of trees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify genus and species of trees.

pcs.text: Recognise signs of stress according to the characteristics of species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise signs of stress according to the characteristics of species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise signs of stress according to the characteristics of species.

pcs.text: Recognise causes of stress according to characteristics of species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise causes of stress according to characteristics of species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise causes of stress according to characteristics of species.

pcs.text: Assess abiotic factors affecting health of trees and impact on growth
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess abiotic factors affecting health of trees and impact on growth?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess abiotic factors affecting health of trees and impact on growth.

pcs.text: Assess biotic factors affecting health of trees and impact on growth
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess biotic factors affecting health of trees and impact on growth?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess biotic factors affecting health of trees and impact on growth.

pcs.text: Record and report results of site assessment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report results of site assessment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report results of site assessment according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Undertake site assessment of trees

elements.title: Prepare tree maintenance program

pcs.text: Identify maintenance requirements for trees according to identified health issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify maintenance requirements for trees according to identified health issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify maintenance requirements for trees according to identified health issues.

pcs.text: Select treatments for identified maintenance requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select treatments for identified maintenance requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select treatments for identified maintenance requirements.

pcs.text: Identify environmental implications for identified treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental implications for identified treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental implications for identified treatments.

pcs.text: Document a maintenance program using requirements, treatments and environmental implications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document a maintenance program using requirements, treatments and environmental implications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document a maintenance program using requirements, treatments and environmental implications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare tree maintenance program

elements.title: Undertake treatment program

pcs.text: Select tools, equipment and machinery required for treatment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools, equipment and machinery required for treatment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools, equipment and machinery required for treatment.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-operational checks and calibrate equipment and machinery according to manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-operational checks and calibrate equipment and machinery according to manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-operational checks and calibrate equipment and machinery according to manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Implement workplace health, safety, environmental and traffic control procedures according to JSA
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement workplace health, safety, environmental and traffic control procedures according to JSA?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement workplace health, safety, environmental and traffic control procedures according to JSA.

pcs.text: Apply treatments according to maintenance plan and environmental procedures and industry best practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply treatments according to maintenance plan and environmental procedures and industry best practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply treatments according to maintenance plan and environmental procedures and industry best practice.

pcs.text: Maintain growing environment according to species cultural requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain growing environment according to species cultural requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain growing environment according to species cultural requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Undertake treatment program

elements.title: Complete treatment program activities

pcs.text: Dispose of waste according to workplace and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of waste according to workplace and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of waste according to workplace and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Clean and sanitise equipment according to biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and sanitise equipment according to biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and sanitise equipment according to biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Clean and store personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Determine schedule for follow-up treatments and communicate to work team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine schedule for follow-up treatments and communicate to work team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine schedule for follow-up treatments and communicate to work team.

pcs.text: Maintain records and report work outcomes according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records and report work outcomes according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records and report work outcomes according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete treatment program activities

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
